languages.text: "Передумали? Как же изобретательна и незаметна ересь. Если вы единожды помыслили воспротивиться посланникам {g|Encyclopedia:GoldenThroneGlossary}Золотого Трона{/g}, назад дороги нет. Вы уже мертвы, мой переменчивый собеседник.". {n}Щелчок знаменует отключение вашего собеседника от вокс-передачи{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Передумали? Как же изобретательна и незаметна ересь. Если вы единожды помыслили воспротивиться посланникам {g|Encyclopedia:GoldenThroneGlossary}Золотого Трона{/g}, назад дороги нет. Вы уже мертвы, мой переменчивый собеседник.". {n}Щелчок знаменует отключение вашего собеседника от вокс-передачи{/n}

languages.text: "You have changed your mind? How ingenious and inconspicuous is heresy. Should you think to oppose the envoys of the {g|Encyclopedia:GoldenThroneGlossary}Golden Throne{/g}, even once, then there is no way back. You are already dead, my fickle interlocutor." {n}A click signals the disconnection of the vox-transmission.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Передумали? Как же изобретательна и незаметна ересь. Если вы единожды помыслили воспротивиться посланникам {g|Encyclopedia:GoldenThroneGlossary}Золотого Трона{/g}, назад дороги нет. Вы уже мертвы, мой переменчивый собеседник.". {n}Щелчок знаменует отключение вашего собеседника от вокс-передачи{/n}

languages.text: “改主意了？真是巧妙又隐蔽的异端行径。但凡你动过一丝与{g|Encyclopedia:GoldenThroneGlossary}黄金王座{/g}的使者为敌的念头，就再没有回头路。你死定了，反复无常的蠢货。”{n}一声轻响过后，音阵通讯中断了。{/n}
languages.original_text: "You have changed your mind? How ingenious and inconspicuous is heresy. Should you think to oppose the envoys of the {g|Encyclopedia:GoldenThroneGlossary}Golden Throne{/g}, even once, then there is no way back. You are already dead, my fickle interlocutor." {n}A click signals the disconnection of the vox-transmission.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “改主意了？真是巧妙又隐蔽的异端行径。但凡你动过一丝与{g|Encyclopedia:GoldenThroneGlossary}黄金王座{/g}的使者为敌的念头，就再没有回头路。你死定了，反复无常的蠢货。”{n}一声轻响过后，音阵通讯中断了。{/n}

languages.text: « Vous avez changé d'avis ? L'hérésie est si ingénieuse et insidieuse. Si vous comptez vous opposer aux envoyés du {g|Encyclopedia:GoldenThroneGlossary}Trône d'Or{/g}, ne serait-ce qu'une seule fois, vous ne pourrez plus faire demi-tour. Vous êtes déjà {mf|mort|morte}, mon {mf|inconstant interlocuteur|inconstante interlocutrice}. » {n}Vous entendez ensuite un clic signalant que la transmission-vox a pris fin.{/n}
languages.original_text: "You have changed your mind? How ingenious and inconspicuous is heresy. Should you think to oppose the envoys of the {g|Encyclopedia:GoldenThroneGlossary}Golden Throne{/g}, even once, then there is no way back. You are already dead, my fickle interlocutor." {n}A click signals the disconnection of the vox-transmission.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Vous avez changé d'avis ? L'hérésie est si ingénieuse et insidieuse. Si vous comptez vous opposer aux envoyés du {g|Encyclopedia:GoldenThroneGlossary}Trône d'Or{/g}, ne serait-ce qu'une seule fois, vous ne pourrez plus faire demi-tour. Vous êtes déjà {mf|mort|morte}, mon {mf|inconstant interlocuteur|inconstante interlocutrice}. » {n}Vous entendez ensuite un clic signalant que la transmission-vox a pris fin.{/n}

languages.text: "Fikrinizi mi değiştirdiniz? Kâfirlik ne kadar da dâhiyane şey, asla göze çarpmıyor. {g|Encyclopedia:GoldenThroneGlossary}Altın Taht'ın{/g} elçilerine bir kez olsun karşı çıkmayı düşünürseniz bunun dönüşü olmaz. Siz çoktan öldünüz sebat bilmez muhatabım." {n}Bir tıklama, voks iletiminin bağlantısının kesildiğini gösteriyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "You have changed your mind? How ingenious and inconspicuous is heresy. Should you think to oppose the envoys of the {g|Encyclopedia:GoldenThroneGlossary}Golden Throne{/g}, even once, then there is no way back. You are already dead, my fickle interlocutor." {n}A click signals the disconnection of the vox-transmission.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Fikrinizi mi değiştirdiniz? Kâfirlik ne kadar da dâhiyane şey, asla göze çarpmıyor. {g|Encyclopedia:GoldenThroneGlossary}Altın Taht'ın{/g} elçilerine bir kez olsun karşı çıkmayı düşünürseniz bunun dönüşü olmaz. Siz çoktan öldünüz sebat bilmez muhatabım." {n}Bir tıklama, voks iletiminin bağlantısının kesildiğini gösteriyor.{/n}

languages.text: «¿Ha cambiado de idea? Lo ingeniosa y sutil que es la herejía. Si se plantea oponerse a los emisarios del {g|Encyclopedia:GoldenThroneGlossary}Trono Dorado{/g}, aunque sea una sola vez, no hay marcha atrás. Ya puede darse por muert{mf|o|a}, mi voluble interlocutor{mf||a}». {n}Un clic indica la desconexión de la transmisión por voco.{/n}
languages.original_text: "You have changed your mind? How ingenious and inconspicuous is heresy. Should you think to oppose the envoys of the {g|Encyclopedia:GoldenThroneGlossary}Golden Throne{/g}, even once, then there is no way back. You are already dead, my fickle interlocutor." {n}A click signals the disconnection of the vox-transmission.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «¿Ha cambiado de idea? Lo ingeniosa y sutil que es la herejía. Si se plantea oponerse a los emisarios del {g|Encyclopedia:GoldenThroneGlossary}Trono Dorado{/g}, aunque sea una sola vez, no hay marcha atrás. Ya puede darse por muert{mf|o|a}, mi voluble interlocutor{mf||a}». {n}Un clic indica la desconexión de la transmisión por voco.{/n}

languages.text: "Ihr habt es Euch anders überlegt? Wie erfinderisch und unscheinbar die Ketzerei doch ist. Widersetzt Ihr Euch den Gesandten des {g|Encyclopedia:GoldenThroneGlossary}Goldenen Throns{/g} auch nur einmal, gibt es kein Zurück mehr. Ihr seid bereits tot, {mf|mein unsteter Gesprächspartner|meine unstete Gesprächspartnerin}." {n}Ein Klicken zeigt das Ende der Vox-Übertragung an.{/n}
languages.original_text: "You have changed your mind? How ingenious and inconspicuous is heresy. Should you think to oppose the envoys of the {g|Encyclopedia:GoldenThroneGlossary}Golden Throne{/g}, even once, then there is no way back. You are already dead, my fickle interlocutor." {n}A click signals the disconnection of the vox-transmission.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Ihr habt es Euch anders überlegt? Wie erfinderisch und unscheinbar die Ketzerei doch ist. Widersetzt Ihr Euch den Gesandten des {g|Encyclopedia:GoldenThroneGlossary}Goldenen Throns{/g} auch nur einmal, gibt es kein Zurück mehr. Ihr seid bereits tot, {mf|mein unsteter Gesprächspartner|meine unstete Gesprächspartnerin}." {n}Ein Klicken zeigt das Ende der Vox-Übertragung an.{/n}

languages.text: 「考えを変えたのですか？異端の巧妙さと目立たなさ。{g|Encyclopedia:GoldenThroneGlossary}黄金の王座{/g}の使節に一度でも抵抗しようとするならば、もう引き返せない。あなたはすでに死んでいる、私の変わりやすい対話者よ。」{n}クリック音と共に、ボイス通信が切れた。{/n}
languages.original_text: "You have changed your mind? How ingenious and inconspicuous is heresy. Should you think to oppose the envoys of the {g|Encyclopedia:GoldenThroneGlossary}Golden Throne{/g}, even once, then there is no way back. You are already dead, my fickle interlocutor." {n}A click signals the disconnection of the vox-transmission.{/n}
